overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through a wet downtown city street at night. The character crosses an intersection and walks along the sidewalk before entering a covered building entrance, with artificial lighting from street lamps and building windows illuminating the scene.

events.description: ego begins walking across the crosswalk from the sidewalk corner
ego crosses alongside a pedestrian wearing red pants

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk then beginning to cross the wet street alongside a pedestrian in red pants

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red pants crossing the street alongside ego

entered.detail: modern skyscraper with illuminated windows dominating the background skyline
older multi-story brick buildings with fire escapes lining the street
white striped pedestrian crossing on wet reflective asphalt
large illuminated billboard with yellow Snapmatic logo
traffic signal pole at the intersection corner showing red light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a nighttime urban intersection with wet streets reflecting the city lights. The ego character stands at a crosswalk with a modern glass skyscraper visible in the distance and older brick buildings to the left. The character begins crossing the street alongside a pedestrian in red pants, moving from the sidewalk onto the asphalt crosswalk.

events.description: ego steps onto the opposite sidewalk, completing the street crossing

agents.ego_description: completing the street crossing and stepping onto the sidewalk, passing a man standing near a pole

notable_agents.action: man in beige shirt standing near a street lamp pole on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall black street light with glowing lamp illuminating the sidewalk
red fire hydrant on the sidewalk corner
black metal trash receptacle on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The ego character finishes crossing the intersection and steps onto the opposite sidewalk. The camera passes a man standing near a street lamp and fire hydrant. The tall office tower shifts to the left side of the frame as the character turns to follow the sidewalk, with parked cars now visible along the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sidewalk with parked cars and benches

events.description: ego passes by a pedestrian standing on the sidewalk, temporarily blocking the view
approaching the covered entrance of a building with overhead awning

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past parked cars and benches, approaching a covered building entrance

entered.detail: row of vintage cars parked along the curb including a red convertible and black sedan
metal park benches lined up along the sidewalk next to the parked cars
building entrance with overhead awning and illuminated ceiling panels visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the open sidewalk past a row of parked vintage cars and empty benches. The street is lined with historic brick buildings on the left and a modern building facade on the right. The character approaches a covered building entrance in the distance, passing other pedestrians walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered building entrance with overhead awning

events.description: ego enters the covered building entrance, blocking the sky from view

agents.ego_description: walking under the covered building entrance with illuminated ceiling panels, following other pedestrians ahead

notable_agents.action: couple walking ahead under the covered entrance

entered.detail: recessed circular lighting panels in the covered entrance ceiling
large stone columns supporting the building overhang

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered building entrance with an overhead awning that blocks the night sky. The area is illuminated by recessed ceiling lights and lined with stone columns. The character follows a couple walking ahead under the cover, with the historic brick buildings now visible through the open sides of the entranceway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked urban intersection into the sheltered entrance of a city building. It begins at a nighttime crosswalk where the character moves across wet asphalt reflecting city lights, passing a pedestrian in red pants toward a distant glass skyscraper. As the character reaches the opposite sidewalk, the camera glides past a street lamp and fire hydrant, shifting the perspective to follow a row of parked vintage cars and empty benches. The scene then expands along a stretch of historic brick buildings and modern facades before the character approaches a covered entryway. Finally, the camera moves under a ceiling awning illuminated by recessed lights and lined with stone columns, following a couple into the sheltered space.
